GoPlus SecWareX Energy Card Free Mint: 600 whitelist spots

Connect Wallet & Claim

SecScan

SecScan is an intelligent contract static analysis engine independently developed by the GoPlus team. As a precise, efficient, and comprehensive analysis engine, SecScan faces large-scale malicious contract analysis tasks every day, which may pose a threat to user security. However, with its excellent performance and stability, SecScan can handle over 15 million contract analysis calls every day, ensuring timely and accurate feedback for each call.
The core advantage of SecScan is not just simple code pattern matching, but based on the Static Single Assignment (SSA) analysis method. This allows SecScan to more accurately track the data flow and control flow in the code, enabling the engine to better understand the logic and structure of the code, and identify potential risks that may be overlooked.

Coming Soon

GoPlus Open Source

Decentralize security data and establish an open, open-source, and transparent multi-party data decision-making mechanism.
